competitors.name: Splunk
competitors.keyDifference: Extremely expensive at scale and complex to operate; GenericLogHandler is self-hosted with built-in DB2/PostgreSQL support, eliminating separate database licensing
competitors.notes: Enterprise standard for log management and SIEM. SPL search language, ML analytics, 2,400+ integrations. High cost at scale

competitors.name: Graylog
competitors.keyDifference: Requires MongoDB + Elasticsearch/OpenSearch backends; GenericLogHandler uses existing DB2/PostgreSQL directly, reducing infrastructure overhead
competitors.notes: 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant SIEM leader. Security and compliance focus. Real-time alerting, pipeline processing, dashboards

competitors.name: ELK Stack (Elastic)
competitors.pricing: Free / Open Source → Elastic Cloud from $95/month
competitors.keyDifference: Requires operating 3+ services and substantial resources; GenericLogHandler is a single app with built-in import pipeline using existing DB2/PostgreSQL
competitors.notes: Most widely deployed open-source log management. Elasticsearch (search), Logstash (pipeline), Kibana (visualization). Memory-hungry

competitors.name: Seq (Datalust)
competitors.keyDifference: Focused on structured application logs (Serilog/NLog); GenericLogHandler handles broader log import from multiple sources with alert agent
competitors.notes: Centralized structured logging for .NET. Local data storage, unlimited retention, powerful querying, dashboards. Windows-native

competitors.name: SigNoz
competitors.keyDifference: Uses ClickHouse and is Kubernetes-oriented; GenericLogHandler is simpler with DB2/PostgreSQL backends familiar to enterprise Windows environments
competitors.notes: Unified observability (logs, metrics, traces). 2.5x faster than Elasticsearch, 50% fewer resources. Columnar ClickHouse datastore

competitors.name: Grafana Loki
competitors.keyDifference: Kubernetes-native with label-based indexing (no full-text); GenericLogHandler provides full-text search via DB2/PostgreSQL with dedicated dashboard and alert agent
competitors.notes: Cost-efficient log aggregation. Indexes only labels, not full text. Pairs with Grafana for visualization. Designed for Kubernetes

competitors.name: OpenObserve
competitors.keyDifference: Newer platform focused on storage efficiency; GenericLogHandler leverages existing DB2/PostgreSQL and includes purpose-built alert agent
competitors.notes: Rust-based observability platform. ~140x lower storage costs than ELK. Logs, metrics, traces with built-in UI
